Step 1

Build a search

Paste a plain-English job brief and extract structured criteria. The search recipe drives how candidates are ranked.

Job brief

What are you hiring for?

Extracted criteria

Structured output

Search recipe

FunctionSales
SegmentEnterprise

Industry

CybersecurityIdentitySaaS infrastructure

Evidence signals

Enterprise quota ownershipClosed $100k+ ACV dealsSecurity adjacencyMulti-threaded exec selling

Exclusions

SMB-only backgroundNo closing historyWrong geography

Scoring model

40% rules-based40% fit reasoning20% semantic match

The ranking engine blends keyword rules, LLM-style fit reasoning, and semantic overlap to keep scores explainable. Connect an OpenAI key to activate live LLM scoring.
